allow: Bash(# Get sample source_img URLs from different states to check patterns curl -s ""https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jonkeegan/us-license-plates/main/us-license-plates.csv"")
Bash(# Check California DMV image curl -sI ""https://www.dmv.ca.gov/portal/uploads/2020/03/AmRadioblock.gif"")
Bash(# Get source URLs from different states curl -s ""https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jonkeegan/us-license-plates/main/us-license-plates.csv"")
Bash(# Get the first ""standard"" plate source URL for each of several states curl -s ""https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jonkeegan/us-license-plates/main/us-license-plates.csv"")
Bash(# Get rows where source_img is NOT empty for different states curl -s ""https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jonkeegan/us-license-plates/main/us-license-plates.csv"")

Bash(# Test Alabama DMV image - check headers for content type and size curl -sI ""https://www.revenue.alabama.gov/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/APinkBreastCancerTagFightBreastCancerJoytoLife_tag_page.jpg"")
Bash(# Check Indiana DMV image \(they said it was well built\) curl -sI ""https://www.in.gov/bmv/registration-plates/images/plates/4-H%20Foundation"")
Bash(# Check Washington DMV image curl -sI ""https://www.dol.wa.gov/sites/default/files/plates/4-H"")

Bash(# Check what the jonkeegan repo images look like - try the GitHub raw URL for a plate # The plates are in /plates/{STATE_CODE}/{filename} curl -sI ""https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jonkeegan/us-license-plates/main/plates/AL/APinkBreastCancerTagFightBreastCancerJoytoLife_tag_page.jpg"")
Bash(# Try following Washington redirect curl -sIL ""https://dol.wa.gov/sites/default/files/plates/4-H"")

Bash(# While that runs, let me look at the Wikipedia approach -- many Wikipedia articles about state plates embed a current plate image # These are on Wikimedia Commons with known naming patterns # Check if there''s a consistent naming pattern for current state plate images on Wikipedia curl -s ""https://en.wikipedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&titles=Vehicle_registration_plates_of_California&prop=images&format=json&imlimit=50"")

Bash(# Search for specific current plate images on Wikimedia # The Wikipedia article ""United States license plate designs and serial formats"" has a table with current plates curl -s ""https://en.wikipedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&titles=United_States_license_plate_designs_and_serial_formats&prop=images&format=json&imlimit=500"")
Bash(# Try the goodcar.com image URL pattern curl -sI ""https://goodcar.com/images/license-plate-design/alabama.png"")
Bash(# Better: try blog path curl -sI ""https://goodcar.com/blog/images/license-plate-design/alabama.png"")
Bash(# Check new_york variant and also test the goodcar content type more carefully curl -sI ""https://goodcar.com/images/license-plate-design/new-york.png"")

Bash(# Wikimedia allows requesting thumbnails at specific widths via URL: # https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/X/XX/filename/WIDTHpx-filename # Let me test this with a known clean plate image # First, get the URL for a known file, then request at 600px width # The Florida plate image was 3712x1845 - that''s a photo of a real plate though # Let me search Wikimedia for ""blank"" or ""sample"" or ""standard"" plate images curl -s ""https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&list=search&srsearch=license+plate+sample+standard+intitle:plate&srnamespace=6&srlimit=20&format=json"")

Bash(# Interesting - ""Sample license plate of Maine, 2025.png"" exists! # Let me search more specifically for current state sample plates curl -s ""https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&list=search&srsearch=%22sample+license+plate+of%22&srnamespace=6&srlimit=50&format=json"")

Bash(# Let me check the Maine sample plate dimensions curl -s ""https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&titles=File:Sample_license_plate_of_Maine,_2025.png&prop=imageinfo&iiprop=url|size&format=json"")

Bash(# Check the jonkeegan repo - look for standard/default plates for a handful of states # Let''s find what the standard plate file is called in NY curl -s ""https://api.github.com/repos/jonkeegan/us-license-plates/contents/plates/NY"")
Bash(# Check the CSV for plate_img column to understand what images are in the repo per state curl -s ""https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jonkeegan/us-license-plates/main/us-license-plates.csv"")
Bash(# Let''s check California DMV more thoroughly - the content-length was 0 so let''s check with follow redirects curl -sI -L ""https://www.dmv.ca.gov/portal/uploads/2020/02/pass-1.gif"")

Bash(# Let''s now check what Wikimedia Commons has per state - check a few state categories # For Alabama, California, Texas, New York for state in Alabama California Texas ""New_York""; do echo ""=== $state ==="" curl -s ""https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&list=categorymembers&cmtitle=Category:License_plates_of_$state&cmtype=file&cmlimit=10&format=json"")

Bash(# Wikimedia has mainly historical plates - not useful for current plates # Let''s now check Wikipedia''s article which has current plate images curl -s ""https://en.wikipedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&titles=Vehicle_registration_plates_of_the_United_States&prop=images&imlimit=50&format=json"")

Bash(# Let''s check what the standard plate images look like in the jonkeegan repo # Find standard plates more thoroughly using the CSV curl -s ""https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jonkeegan/us-license-plates/main/us-license-plates.csv"")

Bash(# Let''s try the Wikipedia API to get images from the license plate designs page curl -s ""https://en.wikipedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&titles=United_States_license_plate_designs_and_serial_formats&prop=images&imlimit=500&format=json"")
